559 HYPOGLYCEMIC_INDCTN_ADMSN_CD HYPOGLYCEMIC_INDCTN_ADMSN_CD High-Risk Drug (Indication): Hypoglycemic (Adm) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was taking medication from the hypoglycemic class and whether there was an indication noted for all medications in the drug class. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
^ = Blank
560 HYPOGLYCEMIC_INDCTN_DSCHRG_CD
